//: ORG-LOCKED tier. Deploy to the OS managed-settings path (see managed-settings/README.md) so projects INHERIT and CANNOT WEAKEN these. This is the 'small set of non-negotiable controls at the top, everything else delegated' model from the governance research. Tune to your org before deploying.

permissions.//deny: Default-deny the genuinely dangerous + exfiltration-prone. Agents treated as untrusted contributors.

//enforcement: These keys are honored ONLY in managed-settings (an org admin sets them; users/projects cannot override).
//mcp: Standardize external integrations: only approved MCP servers may be added.

env.//: Org-wide env the agent + hooks can read. Do not put secrets here unless this file is itself access-controlled.
